name: Grandma's Roast Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: Salt and fresh pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 375 DEGREES.
2. PLACE THE CHICKEN ON ITS BREAST on a flat work surface.
3. USING POULTRY SHEARS, CUT ALONG THE ENTIRE LENGTH OF THE BACKBONE.
4. SPREAD THE CHICKEN OPEN and RINSE WITH COLD WATER.
5. DRY WITH PAPER TOWELS.
6. CUT OFF EXCESS FAT AT NECK AND TAIL, AND DISCARD FAT.
7. OPEN THE BIRD OUT AS MUCH AS POSSIBLE.
8. USE THE HEEL OF YOUR HAND AND STRIKE THE BREAST FIRMLY TO BREAK THE BREAST BONE, COLLAR BONES, RIB CAGE, AND WISHBONE.
9. PLACE THE PARSLEY, CELERY, ONION into a 10 to 12 inch oven proof skillet or baking dish, and LAY THE CHICKEN, BREAST SIDE UP, on TOP, arranging the bird SO IT RESTS NEATLY in the SKILLET.
10. SPRINKLE CHICKEN WITH SALT AND PEPPER AND PAPRIKA, AND DOT WITH BUTTER.
11. ROAST UNCOVERED for 35 MINUTES OR UNTIL CHICKEN HAS BEGUN TO BROWN.
12. IN A TWO CUP MEASURING CUP, COMBINE BROTH, LEMON JUICE, AND WINE. RESERVE 1/4 CUP OF THE LIQUID, AND ADD THE REST TO THE SKILLET.
13. BASTE THE CHICKEN, and CONTINUE ROAST UNCOVERED, BASTING EVERY 15 MINUTES, FOR 50 TO 60 MINUTES LONGER, OR UNTIL THE SKIN IS A DEEP GOLDEN BROWN AND JUICES RUN CLEAR WHEN CHICKEN IS PIERCED IN THE THIICKEST PART OF THE THIGH.
14. TRANSFER CHICKEN TO A WARM PLATTER OR GRILL CARVED BOARD and KEEP WARM by COVERING WITH A TENT OF FOIL.
15. DISCARD THE VEGETABLES.
16. TILT THE SKILLET, AND SPOON OFF THE FAT.
17. STRAIN THE DEFATTED COOKING JUICES IF DESIRE AND RETURN JUICES TO THE SKILLET.
18. STIR CORNSTARCH INTO THE RESERVED 1/4 CUP BROTH WINE MIXTURE.
19. ADD THE DISSOLVED CORNSTARCH MIXTURE TO THE BROTH IN THE SKILLET.
20. BRING TO A SIMMER, AND STIR FREQUENTLY UNTIL THICKENED.
21. SERVE GRAVY ALONG SIDE CHICKEN.
